# freeemojipicker.app — Full Details

> Free emoji picker — search, click, copy, and paste emojis instantly.

## About

freeemojipicker.app is a free, browser-based emoji picker with 927 emojis across 9 categories. It runs entirely in the browser with no server-side processing, no tracking, and no ads. Users search by name or keyword, click to copy, and paste anywhere.

## Key Facts

- 927 emojis included inline as a JavaScript array (no external API dependency)
- 9 categories: Smileys (113), People (85), Animals (121), Food (100), Activities (71), Travel (97), Objects (106), Symbols (179), Flags (55)
- Instant search filtering by emoji name and keywords across all categories
- Single-click copy to clipboard using the Clipboard API
- Multi-select mode: toggle on, click emojis to build a string, copy all at once
- Skin tone support for hand and people emojis (6 tones: default + 5 modifiers)
- On desktop: hover to show skin tone popup; on mobile: long-press for bottom sheet
- Recently copied emojis saved in localStorage (last 20), persists across sessions
- Dark mode toggle with localStorage persistence (key: "suite_theme")
- Fully responsive: ~10 columns desktop, 6 tablet, 5 mobile
- PWA-ready with service worker (cache-first) and web app manifest
- Built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — single index.html file, no build step
- Fonts: DM Sans (UI), Lora (content headings), loaded async from Google Fonts
- Design system: light (#faf9f6 bg, #C49A2A accent) and dark (#141412 bg, #D4A835 accent)

## Pages

### Main App — https://freeemojipicker.app/
The primary emoji picker interface. Full-screen app with search bar, category tabs, responsive emoji grid, multi-select toolbar, recently-copied bar, and status bar. Contains all 927 emojis inline. Below the app fold: SEO content with H1, 5 H2 informational sections, and 6 FAQ accordions.

### Emoji Copy and Paste — https://freeemojipicker.app/emoji-copy-paste.html
Target keyword: "emoji copy paste" (800K+ monthly searches). Explains how copy-paste works with emojis, why freeemojipicker.app is better than built-in keyboards. Includes a quick-copy grid of 50 most popular emojis. 3-step tutorial (Find, Click, Paste). Feature comparison grid. 4 FAQ items.

### Emoji Meanings — https://freeemojipicker.app/emoji-meanings.html
Target keyword: "emoji meanings" (1M+ monthly searches). Explains actual/cultural meanings of 50 commonly misunderstood emojis. Covers generational differences (Gen Z vs millennial usage), combo meanings, and context-dependent interpretation. Organized by category: Smileys, Gestures, Hearts, Objects, Communication. 4 FAQ items.

### Heart Emojis — https://freeemojipicker.app/heart-emojis.html
Target keyword: "heart emoji" (500K+ monthly searches). Every heart emoji variant with color meaning explained. Covers 9 colored hearts, 12+ decorative/animated hearts (sparkling, growing, beating, revolving, broken, fire, mending). Click-to-copy on each. Heart combination cards for occasions (Pride, Valentine's, healing, friendship). 3 FAQ items.

### Smiley Face Emojis — https://freeemojipicker.app/smiley-face-emojis.html
Target keyword: "smiley face emoji" (300K+ monthly searches). Every face emoji grouped by emotion: Happy, Love, Silly, Angry, Sad, Worried, Thinking. Each emoji shown with name and usage description. Click-to-copy on every emoji. 3 FAQ items.

### Emojis for Instagram — https://freeemojipicker.app/emoji-for-instagram.html
Target keyword: "emojis for instagram" (200K+ monthly searches). Curated emoji lists grouped by vibe: Aesthetic, Funny, Love, Travel, Food. Each section has individual copyable emojis and copy-ready combination cards with labels. Tips for effective emoji use in bios and captions. 3 FAQ items.

## Technical Details

- All pages share the same design system (CSS custom properties, DM Sans + Lora fonts)
- Dark mode persists across pages via localStorage key "suite_theme"
- All landing pages are standalone HTML with inline CSS — no shared stylesheet dependency
- Every page includes JSON-LD structured data: Article, FAQPage, SoftwareApplication, BreadcrumbList
- Every page includes Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags
- Internal linking: each landing page links to all other landing pages and the main app
- Service worker caches main app assets for offline use
- No JavaScript frameworks, no build tools, no external dependencies beyond Google Fonts

## URL

https://freeemojipicker.app/

## Part of

https://freesuite.app/
